title: Table Of Experience
description: This mod adds a new table block which lets you turn any item into experience.
body:
The mod lets you turn any item into xp bottles.

The new enchantment table allows you to get rid of useless trash by turning it into useful xp bottles instead.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3233ec0301645d1fd85e1089e0e557531fe3ab8b.png)
